data.title: Ethereum jumps 20% after Pectra upgrade, marking largest gain in four years
data.description:
Ethereum has rallied since Tuesday's activation of the Pectra upgrade, the network’s most significant update since the 2022 Merge.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/353763/ethereum-jumps-after-pectra-upgrade-marking-largest-gain-in-four-years?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Microsoft publicly bans employees from using DeepSeek for the first time
data.description: Microsoft Vice Chairman and President Brad Smith said at a U.S. Senate hearing that an internal ban has been issued, prohibiting all employees from using the DeepSeek app (including desktop/mobile). Although DeepSeek is an open source model and companies can deploy it on their own to avoid data backflow, Microsoft pointed out that it still poses the risk of "spreading propaganda or generating unsafe code." It is worth noting that Microsoft has not completely banned competing products (such as Perplexity) in the Windows App Store, but Google apps (including Gemini) have quietly disappeared. (TechCrunch)

data.title: Metaplanet Issues $21.25 Million Zero-Coupon Bonds to Increase Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet has announced the issuance of zero-coupon bonds totaling $21.25 million. The funds raised from this issuance will be allocated to increasing the company's Bitcoin holdings.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that on May 7, Metaplanet invested $53.4 million to acquire an additional 555 Bitcoins. This move is part of the company's ongoing strategy to expand its cryptocurrency portfolio.

data.title: Metaplanet issues $21.25 million in zero-coupon bonds to increase Bitcoin holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Metaplanet, a Japanese listed company, announced today that it will issue zero-interest bonds totaling $21.25 million, and the funds raised will be used to increase its holdings of Bitcoin.
Previously, on May 7, Metaplanet once again spent $53.4 million to increase its holdings of 555 BTC.

data.title: Tether’s USDT supply hits $149.73B, dominated by Tron and Ethereum networks
data.description:

The dominance of two major blockchain platforms in hosting USDT has emerged as a striking feature, with Tron and Ethereum collectively managing nearly 97% of all Tether tokens in [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tethers-usdt-supply-hits-149-73b-dominated-by-tron-and-ethereum-networks/

data.title: Shib Wallet: The Smart Multichain Hub for All Your Crypto Assets
data.description:
In the early days of crypto, wallets were pretty basic—they stored your digital assets and that was about it. But as Web3 has evolved, so has the way we manage our crypto lives. Enter Shib Wallet: a smart, multichain wallet that does more than just hold your tokens. It helps you track your portfolio, automate transactions, interact with dApps, and stay connected to the Shiba Inu ecosystem—all in one place
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/09/shib-wallet-the-smart-multichain-hub-for-all-your-crypto-assets/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shib-wallet-the-smart-multichain-hub-for-all-your-crypto-assets

data.title: Microsoft Restricts Employee Use of DeepSeek App Due to Security Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, Microsoft President Brad Smith announced during a Senate hearing that the company has prohibited its employees from using the DeepSeek application due to concerns over data security and the risk of propagating harmful content. Microsoft has not listed the app in its store. Although the DeepSeek R1 model was available for download on Azure, it was limited to open-source model deployment rather than an official application. Smith also disclosed that Microsoft had modified the DeepSeek model to eliminate potentially harmful content.

data.title: U.S. AI Leadership Requires Regulatory Changes, Says White House Official
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, emphasized the need to abolish AI dissemination rules from the Biden era to win the AI race. He stated that the Trump administration plans to implement simpler regulations to unleash American innovation and ensure the country's dominance in the AI sector.

Sacks highlighted that the United States should be the gold standard and preferred partner for allies and strategic partners in the AI field. He warned that if American companies are hindered by excessive regulations, foreign clients may be unable to purchase technology, potentially causing the U.S. to lose its global market share and influence. Despite these challenges, the U.S. aims to maintain its leadership while strengthening its technological framework worldwide.

data.title: President Trump Slams Fed Chair Jerome Powell After Fed Rejects Rate Cut
data.description:
President Donald Trump is continuing his broadside against Jerome Powell, criticizing the Federal Reserve chair for not slashing interest rates. On Thursday, Trump took to his social media platform, Truth Social, to call Powell “a fool” who “doesn’t have a clue.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/08/us-president-donald-trump-continues-broadside-against-federal-reserve-chair-jerome-powell-as-fed-committee-rules-out-rate-cut/

data.title: Ripple settles SEC legal battle as XRP surges to $2.30, eyeing $3 milestone
data.description:
9-5-2025 – Ripple has drawn a line under its protracted legal wrangle with America’s financial watchdog, sending ripples through the digital asset market as XRP’s value leapt to $2. 30. The landmark settlement, inked at the Southern District Court of New York, marks the denouement of one of the most closely watched regulatory tussles in cryptocurrency [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ripple-settles-sec-legal-battle-as-xrp-surges-to-2-30-eyeing-3-milestone/

data.title: Binance to Airdrop DOOD to MUBARAK, BROCCOLI714, TST, BABYDOGE, and KOMA Holders
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance will airdrop Doodles (DOOD) to users who hold Mubarak (MUBARAK), CZ'S Dog (BROCCOLI714), Test (TST) and Baby Doge Coin (1MBABYDOGE) tokens on the Binance platform and Binance wallet. Eligible users will receive the airdrop in their Binance account.
In addition, Binance Wallet will airdrop Doodles (DOOD) to Koma Inu (KOMA) holders, and eligible users will receive the airdrop in their Binance wallet.

data.title: Tether's USDT Circulation Reaches $149.73 Billion with Tron Leading
data.description: According to PANews, Tether's transparency data reveals that as of 7:30 AM UTC+8, the net circulation of its USDT stablecoin has reached $149.73 billion. Tron holds the largest share with $73.06 billion, followed by Ethereum with $71.56 billion. Together, these two chains account for 96.58% of the total circulation. Solana, Ton, and Avalanche chains have respective circulations of $1.92 billion, $899 million, and $833 million.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Open Interest Reaches Record High of Over $4.9 Billion
data.description: According to Foresight News, official data reveals that Hyperliquid's open interest has reached a historic peak, exceeding $4.9 billion. This milestone marks a significant achievement for the platform, reflecting increased market activity and investor interest. The surge in open interest indicates heightened engagement and confidence in Hyperliquid's offerings.

data.title: Hyperliquid open interest hits record high at over $4.9 billion
data.description: Official data shows that Hyperliquid's open interest has reached a record high of over US$4.9 billion.

data.title: WLFI associated address bought 1587 WETH and 9.7 WBTC in the past 25 minutes
data.description: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that in the past 25 minutes, the address associated with the Trump family's crypto project WLFI bought 1,587 WETH at an average price of $2,200 and 9.7 WBTC at $103,092, with a total value of $4.94 million.

data.title: Ripple Lawsuit News: Settlement Filed, but 4 Big Steps Still Stand Between XRP and Victory
data.description:
S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially filed a Settlement Agreement Letter in its case against Ripple Labs. While the XRP community is celebrating this major development, legal experts warn that the case isn’t fully over yet
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/ripple-lawsuit-news-settlement-filed-but-4-big-steps-still-stand-between-xrp-and-victory/

data.title: The Trump Dinner Ranking will be locked on May 12, with the 220th place holding approximately 3,147 tokens
data.description: The official X account of TRUMP tokens announced that the TRUMP dinner ranking list will be closed at 1:30 pm (EST) on May 12, and the top 220 dinner qualifications will be locked. Trump himself will attend the dinner in person on May 22. According to the ranking data, the current 220th address holds 3158.131 TRUMP tokens, and the time-weighted holdings are 3147.37 tokens. The final qualification is ranked according to time weighting. According to the rules, whales that have recently sold their holdings will still be eligible to attend.

data.title: Cryptocurrency exchange platform coins generally rose: BNB rose 3.91%, GT rose 2.48%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoRank data shows that crypto exchange platform coins generally rose, BNB rose 3.91% in 24 hours, now reported at $625.54, OKB rose 3.55% in 24 hours, now reported at $52.70, GT rose 2.48% in 24 hours, now reported at $21.83. In addition, BNB rose 14.6% in 30 days, OKX rose 5.66% in 30 days, and GT rose 8.55% in 30 days.

data.title: Upbit will adjust the deposit and withdrawal limit time for users who have not completed KYC
data.description: South Korean crypto exchange Upbit officially announced that it will adjust the fund restriction time for users who have not completed the customer identity verification (KYC) re-authentication from May 13, 2025. The restriction will be adjusted from "limited from 24:00 on the deadline" to "limited from 1 hour before the deadline". For example, if the deadline is May 1, the deposit and withdrawal functions will be suspended from that time if the user has not completed it before 23:00 on May 1. Upbit reminds users to complete the verification in advance to avoid affecting transactions.

data.title: Treasure DAO launches Agent Social Pilot, NFT agents can pay to connect to X to post
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Treasure DAO, a blockchain gaming ecosystem, has launched Agent Social Pilot. The first batch of 1,000 places are open to NFT agents on the support list (including SMOL, Azuki, BAYC, Meebits, and Milady Maker). Users can pay 0.005 ETH to activate the X-connection function, allowing agents to post independently.
